output.answer:
The song "The Joker" by the Steve Miller Band was released on **October 1, 1973**. This is the most well-known version of the song, and the release date corresponds to the entry in Wikidata with `wdt:P577` (publication date) matching `1973-10-01`.

<answer>
October 1, 1973
</answer>
output.formatted:
The song "The Joker" by the Steve Miller Band was released on **October 1, 1973**. This is the most well-known version of the song, and the release date corresponds to the entry in Wikidata with `wdt:P577` (publication date) matching `1973-10-01`.

<answer>
October 1, 1973
</answer>

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?song rdfs:label "The Joker" @en ; wdt:P577 ?date .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 11 rows and 1 column, showing the first 5 and last 5 rows below:
| date                                |
| ----------------------------------- |
| 1984-12-15T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1973-10-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1928-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1989-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1961-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| ...                                 |
| 1976-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 2008-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1957-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1964-01-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
| 1973-10-01T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
